title: ConnectomeExplorer: query-guided visual analysis of large volumetric neuroscience data
journal: IEEE Transactions on Visualization and Computer Graphics
abstract: ConnectomeExplorer is an application for the query-guided visual analysis of large volumetric electron microscopy datasets for connectomics. It combines volumetric data visualization with an interactive query algebra that enables neuroscientists to pose domain-specific questions about neural connectivity.
notes: Hanspeter Pfister, Harvard School of Engineering and Applied Sciences. Key contribution to connectomics data visualization tools.
